iso_junctions.note: Union of per-échangeur drive-time polygons; signal #1 fires when the parcel centroid falls inside any of them.

iso_core.note: The metro's last-mile band; signal #3 fires inside any core isochrone.

pop.source: INSEE Filosofi carreaux 200 m via Géoplateforme WFS
pop.note: Cell centroids with resident counts (ind). Signal #2 sums population within a radius of the parcel centroid. Residents, not consumption spend; an honest proxy.
